allow: PowerShell($pgPaths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL", "C:\\PostgreSQL", "C:\\Program Files\\Postgres", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\PostgreSQL"\); foreach \($p in $pgPaths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Get-ChildItem $p | Select-Object Name; break } }; \(Get-Command psql -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)
